title: Review: feat(wolfhsm): add crypto module API
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Key cache leak on drop is the primary risk; users will hit 'cache full' on long-running systems. RsaKey::function footgun will generate recurring issue reports. Both are fixable before API fossilizes.
Confidence: 30% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) no hardware to run against — the 32-byte P-256 size hardcode in wolfhsm_ecc_make_key and key format expectations (DER vs raw point) are unverified, (2) wolfHSM server-side validation behavior on bad inputs not verified. Would raise confidence if: integration tests exercise each operation round-trip, especially ECC ECDH with a real peer DER SPKI.
